title: Configure Request Filtering Module
description: Use IIS Request Filtering to block double-encoded requests, high bit characters, and file extensions.
verification: Double encoded requests like %252f return 404.403; non-ASCII blocked

title: Install and Configure URLScan
description: URLScan 3.1 filters HTTP requests by verbs, extensions, and content length to block malicious input.

implementation.linux: Install URLScan via Web Platform Installer; configure urlscan.ini

verification: Denied URL patterns return 404 with URLScan logging

title: Enable IP and Domain Restrictions
description: Install IP and Domain Restrictions module to allow/deny by IP range or domain.

implementation.linux: Install IP and Domain Restrictions feature; configure web.config ipSecurity

verification: Blocked IP receives 403.6 Forbidden; allowed IPs pass normally

title: Enable Dynamic IP Security Restrictions
description: Block IPs that exceed request rate or concurrent connections. Integrate with Azure if needed.

implementation.linux: Install Dynamic IP Restrictions; configure maxRequests and maxConcurrentRequests

verification: Rapid refresh triggers 403.6 from dynamic restriction; logs show blocked IP

title: Require SSL/TLS and Configure Bindings
description: Require SSL for all bindings. Disable weak TLS versions. Use certificates with proper subject names.

implementation.linux: IIS Manager > Site Bindings > Require SSL; use HSTS IIS module

verification: HTTP binding returns redirect to HTTPS; TLS 1.1 negotiation fails

title: Enable HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS)
description: Install HSTS IIS module and configure max-age, includeSubDomains, and preload directives.

implementation.linux: Install HSTS IIS module; web.config: <hsts enabled=true max-age=31536000 includeSubDomains=true preload=true />

verification: Browser dev tools show HSTS header; https://hstspreload.org/ passes

title: Install and Use URL Rewrite Module
description: Use URL rewrite for canonical hostnames, redirects, and request blocking rules.

implementation.linux: Install URL Rewrite module; configure inbound rules in web.config

verification: Non-canonical host redirects to canonical; blocked patterns return 403

title: Configure Custom Error Pages
description: Replace default IIS error pages with custom pages to prevent version disclosure.

implementation.linux: IIS Manager > Error Pages > Edit Feature Settings > Custom error pages

verification: 404/500 show custom page; no IIS version or stack trace leaked

title: Remove Server Disclosure Headers
description: Remove Server, X-Powered-By, and ASP.NET version headers using URL Rewrite or custom modules.

implementation.linux: Install IIS Remove Headers module or use URL Rewrite outbound rule

verification: curl -I shows no Server, X-Powered-By, or X-AspNet-Version headers

title: Use Application Pool Identities
description: Run each site under its own app pool with least privilege instead of NetworkService or LocalSystem.

implementation.apache: Use separate user per vhost with suexec or mod_itk
implementation.linux: IIS Manager > Application Pools > Identity: ApplicationPoolIdentity; assign unique pool per site

verification: w3wp.exe runs under IIS APPPOOL\SiteName; cannot access other sites files

title: Enable W3C Logging and Protect Log Files
description: Log all requests with full fields. Restrict log directory permissions to prevent tampering.

implementation.linux: IIS Manager > Logging > W3C format; set log dir permissions to administrators only

verification: Logs contain referer, user-agent, and response time; not writable by IIS user

title: Secure FTP or Disable If Not Needed
description: Use FTPS or SFTP instead of plain FTP. Disable FTP service if not actively used.

implementation.linux: IIS Manager > FTP > FTP over SSL; Require SSL for control and data channels

verification: FTP connection requires certificate negotiation; plain FTP on port 21 blocked or disabled

title: Disable WebDAV if Not Needed
description: WebDAV allows file upload and modification via HTTP. Disable if not in use.

implementation.nginx: Not applicable unless third-party module installed
implementation.linux: IIS Manager > WebDAV Authoring Rules > Disable WebDAV; remove WebDAV handler mapping

verification: PROPFIND and PUT requests return 405 Not Allowed or 404

title: Enable ASP.NET Request Validation
description: Enable request validation to block potentially dangerous input like XSS payloads in form data.
verification: POST with <script>alert(1)</script> returns ASP.NET validation error

title: Use Windows Authentication with Kerberos
description: Enable Windows Authentication with negotiate (Kerberos) for internal applications. Disable Anonymous if not needed.

implementation.linux: IIS Manager > Authentication > Windows Authentication enabled; Anonymous Authentication disabled

verification: Browser negotiates Kerberos ticket; network login prompt suppressed
